name: locations
title: Locations
description: Storage locations for the STOCK slice: a self-parent hierarchy (warehouse -> zone -> aisle -> shelf -> bin) plus virtual locations (customer, supplier) that stock_moves uses as counterparties for external origins/destinations. Reconciled against a private predecessor-system catalog audit, not part of this repo (its Location model: 'warehouse->bin hierarchy + virtual customer/supplier'). Locations themselves are ordinary owner-scoped content, unlike stock_moves (see schemas/stock_moves.json's own note on why that collection is append-mode and not content-searchable).

fields.name: location_type
fields.label: Type
fields.help: Matches the predecessor system's Location type choices (reconciled against a private source audit, not part of this repo): a real physical hierarchy (warehouse/zone/aisle/shelf/bin) plus virtual counterparties (customer/supplier/virtual) that stock_moves points at for external origins/destinations. object_stock.py excludes customer/supplier/virtual from on-hand totals.

fields.name: parent_id
fields.label: Parent Location
fields.help: Self-parent hierarchy: warehouse -> zone -> aisle -> shelf -> bin. Optional -- blank means a top-level location (e.g. a warehouse itself, or a virtual customer/supplier location with no physical parent).
